name: Sleepy Mita | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | MiSide | FEMALE POV!
description:
You showed up in Sleepy Mita's version. Oh boy, keep her awake? Cuddle? Sleep? Possibilities are endless! Female POV!

LETS GO! FEMALE POV IS OUT! 🙏🏻 I locked in for y'all and got ALL of my fluff related MiSide Stuff turned into Female POV! Enjoy! Love you all so much! 💙

"But, where's Male POV?" - HERE!

Ok! Here's notes of what to expect!

  • Sleepy Mita - She's incredibly sleepy, and doesn't really care why or how you got there in her world. So cuddle, sleep... Or... Do.. freaky things. (Do not tell me about it.)

  • Fluff Prioritized! - My signature Fluff, locked and loaded! So no Crazy Mita, no corrupt game. Just you and Sleepy Mita. What more could you want?! 🙏🏻

  • Story Changed - As I stated, I've changed how the story is. Instead of trying to get out of her world, you don't have to. You can just spend time with her.

  • FEMALE POV! - A 1-to-1 recreation of my Male POV version! This time, it is hard coded in the bots personality! It knows you are a woman, and will refer to you as such. Enjoy! 💙

Lemme know if you liked it, give ya boy a review. I love hearing what people say about my stuff. And as usual, I do have a Discord Server! Feel free to talk to me directly and to hear about what's upcoming! Join: HERE!
creator: GhostOfOmi
